changes: Migrated from Ethereum Sepolia to GembaBlockchain testnet (chainId 821207). Fresh deployment of EventContract721/1155 templates + PlatformRegistry on Gemba; verified on GembaScan. Backend/listener switched to chainId 821207 (RPC https://testnet.gembascan.io/rpc). Legacy Sepolia deployment retained as historical records (sepolia-latest.json).

EventContract1155.note: redeployed 2026-06-08 with name()/symbol() getters so wallets/explorers show the event name (ERC-1155 has none by default); registry.setTemplate(1) updated. Prior template 0x0b9749eE7DfCE7e1e825C8Fc7C363496ED7F75a0.

configuration.payments: All payments via GembaPay (contracts are payment-agnostic)
